notes: Store-quality feature (PR #439): cached-only six-dimension BL/Bricqer Store Quality scorecard (velocity/picking/margin/ageing/coverage/freshness) plus sourcing scripts (source-demand-gaps, evaluate-job-lot) and snapshot refresh/enrich. CLI-only — no app route imports src/lib/store-quality, so the production UI is unchanged; the deploy ships the lib + dev npm scripts only. Migration 20260614074058_store_quality_runs (owner-scoped RLS) was already applied to cloud; the local file was renamed from 20260614120000 to match remote history so db:push stays in sync. End-to-end run against live prod data produced composite 46.4 over 20,628 lots / GBP 15,918.57, persisted to store_quality_runs (now 4 rows; verified 26 columns, RLS enabled, 3 policies). This deploy also greened a pre-existing CI lint error (no-explicit-any in the vercel-usage route from #438) that had left the lint gate red on main. previousCommit is the prior live main HEAD (9f74ed70, PR #438) for accurate rollback.
